name: Wake Up Mykie!
address: 11300 Old San Antonio Rd, Manchaca, TX 78652, USA
review_1_text: Breakfast sandwiches are a must , packed with amazing flavor and portions are very reasonable. The staff was very warm and welcoming. My daughter and I were off today and wanted to try a new spot for breakfast, It is safe to say we will be trying again 💕
review_2_text: They were very friendly and welcoming! We tried their new croissant sandwich and the croissant was soft and buttery. I would recommend their seasonal menu pancakes, the pumpkin spice.
review_3_text: This was the best breakfast sandwich I have ever eaten. It was simple but packed with flavor. And what a lovely food truck and park! It was busy on a Sunday morning, and the guy in front of me was a regular, so I knew it would be good. I was right, and I will be coming back!!
review_4_text: Food is excellent. A little bit of a wait but worth it. Serves sandwiches, pancakes, n French toast. Will come back to try the fresh squeeze orange juice.
review_5_text: I had the most delicious breakfast sandwich on a croissant with awesome cheese pull. My husband had the breakfast bowl with delicious salsa. Everything was amazing and no line or long wait. I highly suggest you try the fresh squeezed oj.
